I ^ W 3 (xi) ate (xii) ffcn TO W 1*R t cfT ^ W W ^ . * feP? farm (xi) ate (xii) * fo? *rc iicr 3; &3®i t <ft farm W T ^ ^ W ^ ^ ^ WW WWW ^% I tiiU;2£6T{^-'-2 -- 5 of 10 -- THE GAZETTE'OF INDIA : EXTRAORDINARY [PART H~—SEC. 3(i)] f - 5 T M % T . 3 f ^ r g ^ s E f T ( W S T R ^ T ) : . i wm m^ ^ \ ^ HT3fo w $m® 3\0f&\ ;%ST mm t... ............ ^ ^ s ^ £ ^ f^^nm t.... jnfaw>T aftart # sitf?r s?<nsrc ' • . ^sitc^i^cT mmm w& 3t m%® [mTFf. 1/11/2010-#B?T.V] t^pil ^RR, '*FpT Wtt i^ *-™f^*m ****** ^•^•^- 2 2 9 ^ ^ 1 ^ 2 0 ° 9 ^ WSra M ^ * ate w.w.ft ttenw 24 (30.^a- n « . 2010 m ^ T MINISTRY OF CORPORATE AFFAIRS NOTIFICATION New DelM, the 15thNovember, 2010 G.S.R. 914(E)— In exercise of the powers conferred by sub-sections (1) and (2) of section 79 of the Limited Liability Partnership Act, 2008 (6 of 2009), the Central Government hereby makes the following rules further to amend the Limited Liability Partnership Rules, 2009, namely: - 1. (1) These rules may be called the Limited Liability Partnership (Second Amendment) Rules, 2010. (2) They shall come into force on the 6th day of December, 2010. 2. In the Limited Liability Partnership Rules, 2009, in the Annexure, for Form 10, the following Form shall be substituted, namely:- -- 6 of 10 -- [UPTH—STO3(i)] *IR?T M <i«Wi) : ararai^i Form 10 [See rub 10(9)] Intimation of changes in particulars by Designated Partners Note - All fields marked in * are to be mandatorily filled 1. *Designate(jl Partner Identification Number (DPIN) 2, Name of thf Designated Partner: 3. *Please identify and tick the particulars to be changed: • Applicant's Name • Father's / Husband's Name • Nationality Q ResWerttship D (Date of birth D Gender Q Income-tax permanent account number (PAN) • Voter's identity card number • Passport; number • Driving licence number • Residential Address • Otier (piease specify) fo-fll Affix a latest passport size photograph 4. *PIease fill the -Particulars, rehired to be changed (I). Applicants hame (enter full name and do nor use abbreviations) _J (H) O Fatherfs Q Husband's Name (ill). Whether resident in India (w% Nationality OYes O N o (v). Date of Birth (vf). Gender (vii). Income-tax permanent account number (PAN) (viii). Voter's identity card number (ix). Passport Number (x). Driving licence number (DD/MM/YYYY) -- 7 of 10 -- T m t £ l ^ i m * W 3 N m A : EXTRAORDINARY [PART H—SEC. 3(i)] C$), Permanent Residential Access •Unel •Line 2 •City •State •Country •Phone (with STD code) Mobile 1 i i District •Pin Code "ISO Country Code Fax •Email Id (xli). Whether present resictential address is same as the permanent residential address: If no, present residential sddrass OYes ONo •Unel •Une2 •City •State •Country •Phone (with STD code) Mobile District •Pin Code •ISO Country Code Fax •Email Id 5. •Proof of identity and Residence Proof of Identity along with photo and signature Tick against the document being attached (furnish any of the following) • Passport • Election (voter ideltity) card • Driving licence • Income-tax PAN card Proof of residence Tick against the document being attached (furnish any of the following) • Passport D Election (voter identity) card • Ration card D Driving licence • Electricity bill • Telephone bill • Bank account statement • Others-Please specify Attachments* (1) Proof of changes in Identity (2) Proof of changes in residence (3) Photo (4) Optional Attachment List of attachments Afefo Attach Attach Remove Attachment -- 8 of 10 -- [**FTII~ -W$ 3(i)] wa mwm :mmm Statement O Son O Daughter O Wife of hereto dedar£ and verify ttiat the information given in this application and the documents enclosed is correct and complete. *To be digitally signed by the Designated Partner *DPIN Date:' I^^^Bftf General Guidelines for filing Form 1. Attestation/Certification of proof of identity, residence of the applicant (i) The Applicant should attach (a) attested or certified copy of the proof of identity containing self-photograph, date of birth and tattler's/husband's name; (b) attested or certified copy of the proof of residence; (8) In c|se of a foreign national, a copy of the valid passport shall be proof of identity. (p) In <fcse the applicant is nominee of a body corporate, a copy of resolution/authorization on the letterhead of the body corporate mentioning the name and address of an individual nominated to act as designated partner on its behalf shall also be attached. 2» Authorities for attestation/certification (i) (a) Gazetted officer of the Central or State Government (b) Notary Public .(c) Comp&ny Secretary, Charted Accountant, Cost and Works Accountant holding a certificate of practice under the Company Secretaries Act, 1980, Chartered Accountants Act, 1949, and the Cost and Works Accountants Act, 1959. (ii) In the case of foreign nationals residing outside India or foreign body corporate(s) registered outside India, the documerts referred in para 2 above, shall be duly ceritifed and the provisions of sub-rule(2) of rule 34 of Limited Liability Partnership rules shall apply mutatis mutandis for this purpose, (copy of sub-rule(2) of rule 34 is available in the instruction kit) 3. Particulars of the attesting/certifying authority the attesting authority must indicate the following while attesting the documents: (i) Name in full in capitals of the attesting authority (ii) Registration Number arid (Hi) Nameof the ministry/department where the Gazatted officer is employeed, (iv) Seal/Stariip 4. Language of proofs for identity and residence In case the proof of Identity and proof of residence is in a language other than Hindi or English, a certified copy of translation of the same in Hindi or English shall be attached. 5. Father's/Husbands Name In case the proof of identify does not indicate the father's/husband's name then additional proof of father's/husband's name, duly certified /attested, should be attached. 6. Proof of residence Irt caseJthe addresses given in column 3(xi) and (xii) are different, then please attach proof of residence for both the addresses. Further, in case proof ofiidentity attached matches with the addresses given in column 3(xi) and (xii), then separate proof of residence need not be attached. -- 9 of 10 -- 10 THE GAZETTE OFffiflXA : EXTRAORDINARY [PART II—SEC. 3(i)] Fbr Office use only eForm Service Request Itonber (SRN): eForm Filing Date: O This e-form is hereby approve!
